# AXYNTRAX Automation Ecosystem

> AXYNTRAX is a B2B SaaS platform offering an autonomous AI agent ecosystem for business automation, software development, marketing and sales in Latin America and globally.

## Product Summary

AXYNTRAX provides a fleet of specialized AI agents (powered by DeepSeek, Claude, Gemini, Mistral and others) that operate 24/7 to automate business workflows including:
- Autonomous software development and deployment
- WhatsApp-based sales automation and customer service bots
- Social media marketing (LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook) content generation
- CRM automation and lead generation
- Internal business process orchestration

## Target Audience

- B2B SMBs in Peru and Latin America seeking automation
- Enterprise companies needing AI-powered workflow automation
- Startups looking for AI-first infrastructure

## Company

AXYNTRAX Automation — Founded in Arequipa, Peru (2026)
